creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
(In reply to rsmith from comment #11)

Added an experimental patch to configure.ac that moves the test for glib-networking to when we *know* we need webkit. Unfortunately this yields a ton of automake errors.

Every time I have to deal with autoconf files, it reminds me why I dislike it so much. :-/

Anyway, should our port makefile not also add a dependency for glib-networking when helpbrowser is set?
